channel.title: William Fonzface | Blog
channel.description: The personal blog of William Fonzface

item.title: SIC to CPV Converter
item.description:
During my project with the ASI, I came across the problem of converting between SIC codes and CPV codes. SIC codes describe the economic activites of UK companies. On the other hand, CPV codes describe the industries that government contracts fall into. Amazingly, there is no correspondance between these two categorisations. My resulting project, Contracts Recommender relies almost entirely on this translation.

Since this might be useful to others working with government data, I’ve decided to make it open source and release it as a stand-alone project: SICtoCPV. The IPython notebook with all the modules and a worked through example is also available.

Here’s me presenting Contracts Recommender as a Friday lunchtime lecture at the Open Data Institute, where I go into some more detail.

Drop me an email if it’s useful - I’d be interested to hear how people are using it.
